title: Optimize Task Hierarchies
description:
Transform chaotic project planning into systematic excellence! This Short Course was created to help project management professionals accomplish structured task decomposition and data-driven optimization. By completing this course, you'll master the art of breaking down complex initiatives into manageable epics and subtasks while leveraging completion analytics to streamline future workflows.

By the end of this course, you will be able to:
Decompose complex initiatives into epics, tasks, and multi-level subtasks with custom fields and dependencies
Export completion data, calculate cycle-time per task type, and identify scheduling bottlenecks through analysis

This course is unique because it combines hands-on Asana mastery with analytical thinking to create a comprehensive project optimization skillset.

To be successful in this project, you should have a background in basic project management concepts and familiarity with spreadsheet applications.
